AppliedSchema.description: Reference to a schema or data model used in the DMP/DPP record

composition_info.description: Information about how this schema fits in the composite record

schema_reference.description: Core reference information for the schema

schema_usage.description: Context about how this schema is used

AppliedSchema.title: AppliedSchema

CompositionInfo.description: Information about how a schema fits within the composite DMP/DPP record

composition_method.description: How this schema's data is integrated (sequential, nested, mixed, overlay)

data_location.description: JSONPath, XPath, or other pointer to where this schema's data resides

dependency_schemas.description: List of other schemas this one depends on (comma-separated)

parent_schema.description: Reference to parent schema if this is nested

sequence_order.description: Position of this schema's data in the composite record (1-based)

CompositionInfo.title: CompositionInfo

DPRecordMetadata.description: Root class for DMP & DPP Record Metadata model

applied_schemas.description: List of schemas/models that compose this DMP/DPP record

metadata_versioning.description: Version information for the metadata structure itself

record_scope.description: Whether this record describes a product or a material

related_passports.description: Links to related passport records with optional operation references

DPRecordMetadata.title: DPRecordMetadata

MetadataVersioning.description: Version information for the DMP & DPP Record Metadata structure itself

metadata_created.description: Timestamp when this metadata record was created

metadata_language.description: Language of descriptive text in metadata (ISO 639-1 code)

metadata_modified.description: Timestamp when this metadata record was last modified

metadata_schema_url.description: URL to the schema defining this metadata structure

metadata_schema_version.description: Version of this DMP & DPP Record Metadata schema structure

minimum_parser_version.description: Minimum parser version required to process this metadata

MetadataVersioning.title: MetadataVersioning

RecordScopeEnum.description: Whether the record is about a product or a material
RecordScopeEnum.title: RecordScopeEnum

RelatedPassport.description: Link to another passport record, optionally tied to a traceability or life-cycle event

operation_ref.description: Reference to the traceability or life-cycle event data within the DP that defines this relationship

related_passport_id.description: Identifier or URL of the related passport record

relation_type.description: Type of linkage between this record and the related passport

RelatedPassport.title: RelatedPassport

SchemaReference.description: Core identification and reference information for a schema

documentation_url.description: URL to human-readable documentation for this schema

hash_algorithm.description: Algorithm used for hash (SHA-256, SHA-512, MD5, etc.)

schema_hash.description: Cryptographic hash/checksum for schema integrity verification

schema_identifier.description: Alternative identifier if URL not available (e.g., URN, DOI, registry ID)

schema_namespace.description: Namespace or prefix used for this schema in the record

schema_type.description: Classification of schema source (CE-RISE, GS1, Schema.org, ISO, custom, etc.)

schema_url.description: URL or URI identifying the schema

SchemaReference.title: SchemaReference

SchemaUsage.description: Context about how a schema is used in the DMP/DPP record

completeness_percentage.description: Percentage of schema fields that contain data (0-100)

data_completeness.description: Level of data completeness for this schema (full, partial, minimal)

fallback_schema_url.description: Alternative schema to use if primary is not recognized

schema_notes.description: Additional notes about schema usage or exceptions

schema_profile.description: Specific profile or subset of the schema being used

schema_role.description: Purpose of this schema in the DMP/DPP
